subcodes.first_line: O Judah! Glorify the Desire of all worlds, for He hath aided thee to recognize the Dawning-Place of His Revelation and the Source of His inspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یهودا حمد کن مقصود عالمیان را تورا تائید فرمود بر عرفان مشرق وحی و مطلع الهامش
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
